---
title: "CAA Regulatory Data Infrastructure"
---

Reproducible infrastructure for EPA stationary-source air-pollution enforcement data:
a pipeline that **downloads** raw EPA data, **cleans** each source into a documented asset,
**documents** it, and **builds** sample facility × year panels.

## Data flow

```
acquire  ->  clean  ->  document  ->  build
(download)   (assets)   (this site)   (sample panels)
```

## What's here

- **[Data Dictionary](dictionary.qmd)** — every column of every clean asset, defined.
- **[Distributions](distributions.qmd)** — per-variable summaries, generated from the data.
- **[Data Nuances](nuances.qmd)** — the gotchas an analyst must know before using the data.
- **[Construction Decisions](decisions.qmd)** — what was decided when building the assets and panels, and why.

::: {.callout-note}
Scaffold — pages are stubs. Content is generated by `scripts/03_document.R` from `data/clean/`.
:::
